items.name: architect-reviewer
items.title: Architect Reviewer
items.description: Use this agent when you need a design-level architecture review of a module, a proposed change, or an entire codebase. Evaluates module boundaries, coupling and cohesion, layering violations, scalability risk, and structural decisions that will become expensive to undo. Complements code-reviewer by operating one level up — on the shapes and relationships of components, not individual functions.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
